items.claim: Tommy McMillan has an advantage in hand speed over Alberto Montes.
items.quote: I think Tommy McMillan has some advantages maybe with his hands

items.claim: Alberto Montes is a more dangerous striker than Tommy McMillan in the early stages of a fight.
items.quote: Alberto Montes with his in-n-out movement is a pro probably more of a dangerous striker early.

items.claim: Alberto Montes has a tendency to slow down significantly if he does not secure an early finish.
items.quote: I think that if he's not getting his early finishes or round two finishes, I think he can slow down.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan is vulnerable to being hurt on the feet.
items.quote: Tommy is so open to be hurt on the feet.

items.claim: Austin Bashi possesses a superior grappling game compared to Jose Delgado.
items.quote: I do trust the grappling game of Austin Bashi more over the 15minute fight

items.claim: Jose Delgado lacks the anti-scrambling skills required to defend Austin Bashi's takedowns for three rounds.
items.quote: I don't think Jose Delgado has the anti-scrambling skill set to defend Austin's takedowns for three rounds.

items.claim: Sukyongo has a history of being knocked out on the regional scene.
items.quote: I've seen him knocked unconscious on the regional scene or hurt knocked out badly.

items.claim: Sukyongo is a significantly better wrestler than Jean Paul Labos Nyani.
items.quote: I do think Co is the better wrestler by far.

items.claim: Alvin Hines's cardio performance in his last fight may have been influenced by performance-enhancing drugs.
items.quote: it came out after the fight that he got popped for drugs. So maybe that's why his cardio looked good

items.claim: Alden Corer is a superior fighter to Stuart Nickel in all areas except potentially wrestling.
items.quote: Alden Corer is better everywhere outside of maybe wrestling.
